script: Hey sun na, landlord ka message aaya tha, rent is baar Friday tak transfer karna hai, warna late fee lagegi. Tu apna half mujhe Thursday tak bhej dena please. Aur haan, wifi wale ko aaj complaint daal dena, kal se net chal hi nahi raha.

gold.summary: Kavya relays that rent must be transferred by Friday to avoid a late fee, asks for the flatmate's half by Thursday, and wants a complaint filed with the wifi provider today since the internet has been down since yesterday.
gold.translation: Hey listen, the landlord had messaged — this time the rent has to be transferred by Friday, otherwise there'll be a late fee. Please send me your half by Thursday. And yes, file a complaint with the wifi people today, the internet hasn't been working since yesterday.

action_items.task: Send Kavya your half of the rent
File a complaint with the wifi provider

script: Bhai, Gokarna wala plan final ho gaya, 14 se 17. Tu bas ek kaam kar, apna scooty license next week tak renew karwa le, wahan rent pe scooty hi milegi. Hostel main aaj book kar raha hoon, uski tension mat le.

gold.summary: Rohan confirms the Gokarna trip for the 14th to 17th and asks to get the scooter license renewed by next week since scooters will be the rental option there; he is booking the hostel himself today.
gold.translation: Brother, the Gokarna plan is final, from the 14th to the 17th. You just do one thing — get your scooter license renewed by next week, over there you only get scooters on rent. I'm booking the hostel today, don't worry about that.

action_items.task: Renew the scooter license for the Gokarna trip

script: Sun, Mumma ke phone me phir se storage full ho gaya hai, photos backup nahi ho rahi. Weekend pe jab ghar jaye toh unka Google Photos properly set kar dena. Aur unka recharge bhi kara dena, Saturday ko validity khatam ho rahi hai.

gold.summary: Didi asks to properly set up Google Photos backup on Mumma's phone during the weekend home visit, since storage is full again, and to recharge her number before its validity expires on Saturday.
gold.translation: Listen, the storage on Mumma's phone is full again, photos aren't backing up. When you go home over the weekend, set up her Google Photos properly. And get her recharge done too, the validity is expiring on Saturday.

action_items.task: Set up Google Photos backup properly on Mumma's phone
Recharge Mumma's phone before the validity expires

script: Guys ka farewell next Friday hai aur main decorations dekh rahi hoon. Tu us bakery se cake ka order de dena, Thursday pickup bolna, budget max one thousand. Aur contribution wali sheet maine group pe daal di hai, aaj raat tak fill kar dena.

gold.summary: Sneha is handling decorations for next Friday's farewell and asks to order the cake from the bakery for Thursday pickup within a thousand-rupee budget, and to fill the contribution sheet posted on the group by tonight.
gold.translation: The farewell for the guys is next Friday and I'm looking after decorations. You place the cake order at that bakery, tell them Thursday pickup, budget maximum one thousand. And I've posted the contribution sheet on the group, fill it by tonight.

action_items.task: Order the farewell cake from the bakery for Thursday pickup (budget ₹1000)
Fill the contribution sheet posted on the group

script: Bro, kal se gym wapas chalu, pakka wala pakka. Tu apna protein wala scoop laana yaar, mera khatam ho gaya. Aur 6 baje sharp aa jaana, warna baad me bahut rush ho jata hai.

gold.summary: Aman restarts gym from tomorrow and asks to bring the protein scoop since his has run out, and to arrive at 6 sharp to beat the rush.
gold.translation: Bro, gym restarts from tomorrow, absolutely for sure. You bring your protein scoop, yaar, mine is finished. And come at 6 sharp, otherwise it gets really crowded later.

action_items.task: Bring your protein scoop to the gym

script: Arre haan, Nani ke 80th birthday wale video ke liye sab cousins apni clip bhej rahe hain. Tu apni 30 second wali clip Sunday tak mujhe bhej de, phir main edit karungi. Kuch bhi simple sa bol dena, over-thinking mat kar.

gold.summary: Tanvi is collecting cousins' clips for Nani's 80th birthday video and asks for a simple 30-second clip by Sunday so she can edit it together.
gold.translation: Oh yes, for Nani's 80th birthday video all the cousins are sending their clips. You send me your 30-second clip by Sunday, then I'll edit it. Just say something simple, don't overthink it.

action_items.task: Send Tanvi a 30-second video clip for Nani's birthday video

script: Yaar, office ke paas wala naya cafe dekha hai? Soch rahi thi weekend pe try karein, brunch type. Abhi kuch confirm mat kar, Saturday ko dekhte hain mood kaisa hai. Waise mera Monday ka leave approve ho gaya, yay!

gold.summary: Priya tentatively suggests trying the new cafe near office for a weekend brunch, to be decided by Saturday's mood, and shares that her Monday leave got approved.
gold.translation: Yaar, have you seen the new cafe near office? I was thinking we could try it over the weekend, brunch type. Don't confirm anything yet, let's see on Saturday what the mood is like. By the way, my Monday leave got approved, yay!

action_items.task: Try the new cafe near office for brunch

script: Sun na, sofa wala idea shayad drop karte hain, budget se bahar ja raha hai. Ek kaam ho sakta hai, OLX pe second hand dekh lete hain, mila toh theek warna beanbags hi le lenge. Sochte hain, koi jaldi nahi hai.

gold.summary: Nikhil suggests probably dropping the new sofa idea as it exceeds budget, tentatively proposing to look for a second-hand one on OLX and falling back to beanbags otherwise. No urgency.
gold.translation: Listen, maybe we drop the sofa idea, it's going out of budget. One thing we could do is look for a second-hand one on OLX — if we find one, fine, otherwise we'll just get beanbags. Let's think about it, there's no hurry.

action_items.task: Look for a second-hand sofa on OLX

script: Bhai, woh Bangalore wali opening ka JD maine bheja tha, dekha? Main soch raha hoon apply kar hi doon, though notice period ka scene hai. Tu bhi soch le, dono ka referral lagwa sakta hoon. Koi pressure nahi hai.

gold.summary: Varun is considering applying to the Bangalore opening despite notice-period concerns and tentatively suggests the friend consider it too, offering to arrange referrals for both. No pressure.
gold.translation: Brother, that JD for the Bangalore opening I sent — did you see it? I'm thinking I should just apply, though there's the notice period situation. You think about it too, I can get referrals arranged for both of us. No pressure at all.

action_items.task: Consider applying to the Bangalore opening (referral available)

script: Didi ki shaadi ke lehenga shopping ka plan loosely ban raha hai, maybe next Sunday Chandni Chowk. Mumma bol rahi thi tu bhi chale toh achha rahega, par tere exams ka bhi scene hai. Dekh le, ho paye toh aa jaana.

gold.summary: A loose plan is forming for Didi's wedding lehenga shopping, possibly next Sunday at Chandni Chowk; Mumma would like the listener along, exams permitting.
gold.translation: A plan for Didi's wedding lehenga shopping is loosely coming together, maybe next Sunday at Chandni Chowk. Mumma was saying it would be nice if you came too, but there's also your exams situation. See — if it works out, come along.

action_items.task: Join the lehenga shopping trip at Chandni Chowk if exams permit

script: Bro, kal ka El Clasico dekha kya? Kya match tha yaar, last minute winner. Insta pe aaj memes hi memes hain. Office me sab log neend ke maare zombie bane ghoom rahe hain. Chal, lunch pe milte hain waise bhi.

gold.summary: Karan gushes about yesterday's El Clasico and its last-minute winner, the meme flood on Instagram, and sleep-deprived colleagues. Casual chat, no tasks.
gold.translation: Bro, did you watch yesterday's El Clasico? What a match, yaar, a last-minute winner. Instagram is full of memes today. Everyone at office is walking around like zombies from lack of sleep. Anyway, see you at lunch as usual.

script: Oye, maine electricity bill pay kar diya hai, split baad me aaram se kar lenge. Aur plumber wala kaam bhi ho gaya, geyser ab sahi chal raha hai. Bas update dena tha. Party toh banti hai waise meri.

gold.summary: Nikhil reports he has paid the electricity bill — the split can happen later — and the plumber work is done with the geyser working again. Just an update; he jokes he deserves a party.
gold.translation: Hey, I've paid the electricity bill, we'll settle the split later at leisure. And the plumber work is also done, the geyser is running fine now. Just wanted to update you. By the way, I do deserve a party for this.

script: Arre suna tune? Sharma uncle ka beta Canada se permanently wapas aa gaya. Aunty ne poore mohalle me mithai baanti, LOL. Mummy keh rahi thi ab uske liye rishta dhoondh rahe hain. Anyway chill, baad me baat karte hain.

gold.summary: Aditi shares neighbourhood gossip: Sharma uncle's son has moved back from Canada for good, Aunty distributed sweets, and a match is now being sought for him. Pure chat, no tasks.
gold.translation: Hey, did you hear? Sharma uncle's son has come back from Canada permanently. Aunty distributed sweets in the whole neighbourhood, LOL. Mummy was saying they're now looking for a match for him. Anyway chill, we'll talk later.

script: Hey, bas batana tha ki main ab theek hoon, kal raat se fever utar gaya. Doctor ne bola viral hi tha. Soup for the win, seriously. Tu bhi apna khayal rakh, season bahut kharab chal raha hai. Miss you yaar.

gold.summary: Ishita gives a health update — her fever broke last night and the doctor confirmed it was just viral — and adds general take-care wishes. No tasks.
gold.translation: Hey, just wanted to tell you that I'm fine now, the fever came down last night. The doctor said it was just viral. Soup for the win, seriously. You take care of yourself too, the season is really bad. Miss you, yaar.

script: Yaar, woh nayi wali movie finally dekhi, jiska tu itna hype kar raha tha. Honestly? Mujhe overrated lagi, second half me toh main almost so gaya. Haan, songs achhe the, woh maanta hoon. Ab lagta hai reviews pe bharosa karna hi chhod dun.

gold.summary: Dev finally watched the hyped movie and found it overrated — he nearly slept through the second half, though he concedes the songs were good. Casual opinion sharing, no tasks.
gold.translation: Yaar, I finally watched that new movie you were hyping so much. Honestly? I found it overrated, I almost fell asleep in the second half. Yes, the songs were good, I'll grant that. Now I feel like I should just stop trusting reviews.

script: Uff yaar, main abhi office nikal gayi hoon aur lagta hai balcony ka darwaza khula reh gaya hai. Baarish bhi start ho gayi hai aur wahan mere saare plants aur wo nayi wali bookshelf rakhi hai. Main four baje se pehle nahi aa paungi kisi haal me.

gold.summary: Kavya has left for office and thinks the balcony door was left open; it has started raining with her plants and new bookshelf exposed, and she cannot return before four — implying the flatmate should close it.
gold.translation: Ugh yaar, I've just left for office and I think the balcony door has been left open. It's also started raining, and all my plants and that new bookshelf are kept out there. There's no way I can come back before four.

action_items.task: Close the balcony door before the rain gets in

script: Bro, ek chhota sa favour chahiye tha. Tu kal airport ja raha hai na apni flight ke liye? Mera power bank pichhli baar tere paas hi reh gaya tha, kya tu use Arjun ko de dega airport pe? Wo bhi wahi hoga usi time pe, timing uske saath coordinate kar liyo.

gold.summary: Rohan asks whether the listener, going to the airport tomorrow, can hand his forgotten power bank to Arjun there, coordinating the timing with Arjun who will be there at the same time.
gold.translation: Bro, I needed one small favour. You're going to the airport tomorrow for your flight, right? My power bank got left with you last time — could you give it to Arjun at the airport? He'll also be right there at the same time, do coordinate the timing with him.

action_items.task: Hand over Rohan's power bank to Arjun at the airport
Coordinate the handover timing with Arjun
